title: Specklinia kennedyi
taxonomy: Specklinia kennedyi is a species of orchid in the genus Specklinia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Specklinia is a subgenus of Pleurothallis and is part of the tribe Maxillarieae. This plant is native to Central and South America and is often found in shaded, humid environments. Specklinia kennedyi is classified as a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows on the ground rather than on other plants.
